mnemonics: FINS for Functional: Focus, Include, Necessary, Specific
FINS for Nonfunctional: Focus, Include, Necessary, Specific, Scalable
keyPoints: Functional Requirements: Define what the system should do
Functional Requirements: Be Specific and Precise
Functional Requirements: Include User Needs and Business Requirements
Functional Requirements: Focus on System Capabilities
Nonfunctional Requirements: Define System Performance Characteristics
Nonfunctional Requirements: Include Scalability, Security, Usability
Nonfunctional Requirements: Focus on System Constraints
